en: Api’, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Api’, are you home?

ab: Awaay i loma’ ci Api’! Ci Ipih kako. O maan ko demak? Ano taloma’ ciira, paratoh hato ako.
ch: B:Api’不在家耶!我是Ipih，有什麼事嗎? 她回來我會轉告她。
en: Api’ is not at home. I am Ipih. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: Ci Panay aci Api’ kami. Fohaten ho^ ko fawahan!
en: Grandma, we are Panay and Api’, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: Ci Fuya^ kako, mikilimay kako ci Okayan.
en: I am Fuya^, I am here for Okay.

ab: Ina^, tayni kako a miliso’ i tosowanan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Hala:fin to kiso caay ka tayni, mao:ron kako i tisowanan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.
Api, I am here to play with you.
Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: O nipalomaan ako kina fonga^, tanamen a komaen ari!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Ati Ati! O nipalomaan ako kina heci^ no losay, tanamen a komaen ari.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Kamaro! O nipalomaan ako kina awaayay ko iyo^ a ’ariray, tanamen a komaen ari!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: Caay ka maen kako to mami^, o ling-ko^ aca^ ko kaenen ako.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Podacen ako ko heci^ no losay, o kakaenen iso.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Aray! Adihay ko salang nina heci^ no losay.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Alaen ako ko nanom, o nananomen iso.
en: I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: Adihayen kamaen, adihay ko nisafelan ako a sinafel.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Hay haw! Fangsis ri kaeso’ ko kaen ako.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Adihay to ko nikaenan ako, na’ay to.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
